message:
feat(grpc): add server reflection service with descriptor registry

Implement gRPC server reflection (service listing and description) for
production introspection and tooling compatibility:

- src/grpc/reflection.rs (new): ReflectionService with BTreeMap-backed
  descriptor registry supporting list_services() and describe_service()
  queries, async RPC-style wrappers, and NamedService + ServiceHandler
  trait implementations. Includes unit tests for registration, lookup,
  missing-service errors, async helpers, and trait conformance.
- src/grpc/mod.rs: declare reflection submodule and re-export all public
  types (ReflectionService, ReflectedMethod, ReflectedService, request/
  response types)
- src/grpc/server.rs: integrate reflection into ServerBuilder with
  enable_reflection() method that snapshots existing descriptors and
  auto-registers future add_service() calls. Tests verify reflection
  tracks both pre- and post-registration services.
- tests/grpc_e2e.rs: Section 15 E2E test exercising full reflection
  workflow — register, list, describe with method verification
- tests/grpc_verification.rs: three verification tests for traits,
  core registry flow, and async helpers

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
